name: What if no witnesses to my neck tweak at work in Saint George?
description: Medical proof and your account enough.[1]

mainEntity.name: What if no witnesses to my neck tweak at work in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical proof and your account enough.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Your testimony plus medical evidence and work records suffice.[1] Key factors: (1) Consistent symptom history; (2) Video/surveillance if any; (3) Coworker statements later. Build circumstantial case. Many claims succeed without witnesses.
